items.name_en: BV Mini Solstice latest shoulder bag, summer relaxation, it's really cute. The Knot metal knot decoration on both sides adds interest. BV's recent soul element, not every bag has this. Compared to the other two sizes, this mini is more elegant and exquisite. Niche and unique, can be sweet or cool.

items.name_en: BV New Arrival! The Andiamo combines archival Parachute bag elements with modern trends. A classic design featuring a handle, shoulder, and crossbody straps. Adorned with metal brass knot closures. Compact yet surprisingly spacious, easily fitting daily essentials like sunglasses, a small water bottle, compact powder, and a charger. Goes perfectly with any outfit.
items.name_cn:
BV New Arrival! The Andiamo combines archival Parachute bag elements with modern trends. A classic design featuring a handle, shoulder, and crossbody straps. Adorned with metal brass knot closures. Compact yet surprisingly spacious, easily fitting daily essentials like sunglasses, a small water bottle, compact powder, and a charger. Goes perfectly with any outfit.
Model: 796569
Size: 21*17*16.5cm
